snapshots.label: initial
snapshots.html: <button style="padding: 8px 20px; border-radius: 8px; border: none none; background: #374151; color: #6b7280; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; cursor: not-allowed; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s;" disabled="">Disabled</button>

snapshots.label: before click
snapshots.html: <button style="padding: 8px 20px; border-radius: 8px; border: none none; background: #6366f1; color: #fff; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s;">Submit</button>

snapshots.label: after click
snapshots.html: <button style="padding: 8px 20px; border-radius: 8px; border: none none; background: #374151; color: #6b7280; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; cursor: not-allowed; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s;" disabled="">Disabled</button>
